canonical_operators.language: put the black bowl at the front on the plate

operators.name: PickUp
operators.description: pick up the black bowl from the front of the kitchen table

operators.name: Place
operators.description: place the black bowl on the plate

preconditions: On[black bowl at the front, kitchen_table]
annotation.description: The robot picks up the black bowl at the front from the kitchen table.

annotation.operator: Place[black bowl at the front, plate]
effects: On black bowl at the front plate
annotation.description: The robot places the held bowl onto the plate, releasing it to complete the task.
